sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56838" key="kerdogame/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κερδογᾰμέω</orth>, <sense id="n56838.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">marry for gain</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0097.tlg001:6:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diogenian.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
